name: io.gitlab.vlogr/ssemble-mcp-server
title: Ssemble AI Clipping
description: Create AI-powered short-form video clips from YouTube videos or uploaded files. Browse caption templates, background music, gameplay overlays, and meme hooks.

environmentVariables.name: SSEMBLE_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your Ssemble API key (starts with sk_ssemble_). Get it at https://app.ssemble.com → Settings → API Keys
